paragraphs.text: Whilst this brother was staying by the holy Jordan after his brother's death, an elder came (rom the Lavra of Calamdn and said to him: ‘Tell me, brother: what good bas it done you persevering so long in silent recollection and sell-denial?” The brother said: ‘Go

away and come back in ten days’ time and 1 will tell you. The elder came back after ten days and found the brother dead. He found there a picce of broken pottery with this written an it: ‘Forgive me, father, but I have never let my mind remain earth-bound whilst performing my spiritual duties”.*
